name: Apple TV+
description: Apple's premium streaming service with award-winning originals like Severance, Ted Lasso, The Morning Show, and Slow Horses. No library filler — just originals.

name: Crunchyroll
description: The biggest dedicated anime streaming service. Watch simulcasts hours after Japan, plus classic series and manga.

name: Disney+
description: Stream Disney, Pixar, Marvel, Star Wars, and National Geographic content. Includes 4K HDR and downloads for offline viewing.

name: Jellyfin
description: Free, open-source media server. Self-host your movie, TV, music, and photo library with a Netflix-like interface. No subscriptions, no tracking.

name: Kick
description: Streaming platform with creator-friendly terms and a 95/5 revenue split. Growing community for gaming and IRL streams.

name: Max
description: HBO Max rebranded streaming platform. Home to HBO originals, Warner Bros films, DC content, and Max Originals. Premium prestige TV in one place.

name: Mubi
description: Curated arthouse and independent cinema streaming. A hand-picked rotating selection of acclaimed films — perfect for cinephiles tired of algorithm-driven platforms.

name: Netflix
description: On-demand streaming service for movies, series, documentaries, and Netflix Originals. No ads on any plan.

name: Paramount+
description: Streaming platform with CBS, MTV, Nickelodeon, and Paramount films. Home to Star Trek, Yellowstone, South Park, and live sports including NFL.

name: Prime Video
description: Amazon's streaming service with originals, blockbusters, live sports, and add-on channels. Included with Prime.

name: Twitch
description: Live streaming platform dominated by gaming, esports, and IRL content. Watch, chat, and subscribe to your favourite streamers.

name: Twitch
description: The leading live-streaming platform for gaming, music, and creative content. Chat, subscribe, and support streamers live.

name: Crunchyroll
description: The biggest anime and manga streaming service. Simulcasts new episodes from Japan and has a huge back-catalogue.

name: Plex
description: Stream your personal media library from anywhere plus free ad-supported movies, TV, and live news channels.

name: Kick
description: Creator-first live-streaming platform with a 95/5 revenue split. Fast-growing alternative to Twitch with less restrictive rules.
